name: Puttu Recipe | Kerala Puttu

steps.instruction: Mix puttu flour with salt. Sprinkle water gradually and mix with fingertips to get crumbly texture.
Break all lumps. Optionally grind in mixer using pulse.
Boil water in puttu kudam base.
Layer coconut and puttu flour alternately in cylindrical vessel ending with coconut on top.
Place on boiling water vessel and steam on medium flame till steam comes from top vents.
Cool slightly, remove with skewer and serve hot.

tips: Water quantity depends on rice flour quality.
Right texture: flour should form lump that crumbles when pressed.
Steaming time varies with size of puttu maker.
If no puttu maker, use idli pan with layers.
variations: Use bamboo logs for traditional aroma.
Use red rice flour or wheat flour.
